ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year_start" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "year_end" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season starts */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season ends */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Date the playoffs start */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* Date the playoffs end */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Win-loss percentage */,
  "games_behind" TEXT /* Games behind the division leader */,
  "points_scored_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "simple_rating_system" REAL /* Simple rating system (SRS) */,
  "playoff_seeding" INTEGER /* Playoff seeding (if applicable) */,
  "playoff_record" TEXT /* Playoff record (if applicable) */,
  "conference_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking in the conference */,
  "division_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended their role */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SF) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "years_pro" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the NBA */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_records" (
  "playoff_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "playoff_round" TEXT /* Playoff round (e.g., First Round, Conference Finals) */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "series_result" TEXT /* Series result (e.g., W 4-2, L 2-4) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the series */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Total games won in the series */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Total games lost in the series */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the series */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_records_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (player or team) */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., player, team) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went to overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "tv_broadcast" TEXT /* TV broadcast information (e.g., ESPN, TNT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_agents" (
  "free_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free agent */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "free_agent_type" TEXT /* Type of free agent (e.g., unrestricted, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("free_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
